found.quote: Notwithstanding Section 3, Custodian may deploy idle balances for settlement liquidity, inventory smoothing, and collateral substitutions until a withdrawal is pending.

Customer retains all beneficial ownership of Customer Assets. Custodian will not sell, lend, pledge, rehypothecate, transfer, encumber, invest, stake, or otherwise use Customer Assets for Custodian's own account or for any other customer without Customer's prior written consent.

Custodian will maintain commercially reasonable crime and technology coverage, with policy amounts, deductibles, exclusions, and covered causes determined by Custodian from time to time. Custodian will provide certificates or summaries of coverage upon reasonable request.

"Customer Assets" means supported units recorded to Customer's primary custody account, excluding chain-split property, promotional distributions, validator proceeds, and other network-originated items unless Custodian separately credits them.
